projects.title: E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: A full-featured e-commerce platform with payment integration, product management, and order tracking. Built with modern technologies for scalability and performance.
projects.longDescription: Comprehensive e-commerce solution featuring product catalog, shopping cart, checkout process, order management, and admin dashboard. Implemented real-time orders tracking and email notifications.

projects.title: Task Management App
projects.description: A collaborative task management application with real-time updates, team collaboration features, and productivity analytics.
projects.longDescription: Project management tool with drag-and-drop task boards, real-time collaboration using WebSockets, file attachments, comments, time tracking, and detailed analytics dashboard. Supports multiple projects and team management.

projects.title: Weather Dashboard
projects.description: Real-time weather application with location-based forecasts, interactive maps, and weather alerts.
projects.longDescription: Weather application featuring current conditions, 7-day forecast, hourly predictions, weather maps, severe weather alerts, and location search. Integrates with multiple weather APIs for accurate data.

projects.title: Social Media API
projects.description: RESTful API for a social media platform with authentication, posts, comments, and real-time notifications.
projects.longDescription: Backend API supporting user authentication (JWT), profile management, posts/comments CRUD operations, like/follow system, real-time notifications, image upload, and comprehensive testing suite.

projects.title: Portfolio Generator
projects.description: Web application that helps developers create professional portfolio websites using customizable templates.
projects.longDescription: SaaS application allowing users to create portfolios by selecting templates, customizing colors/fonts, adding content through forms, and exporting static websites. Includes template editor and preview functionality.

projects.title: Code Snippet Manager
projects.description: Desktop application for organizing and managing code snippets with syntax highlighting and search.
projects.longDescription: Electron-based desktop app for saving, organizing, and quickly accessing code snippets. Features syntax highlighting, tag-based organization, full-text search, and cloud sync capabilities.
